---
title: "The Rev. William Cosmo Gordon Lang"
---

## The Rev. William Cosmo Gordon Lang

**Dates:** (1864-1945)

### Description

later (1928) Archbishop of Canterbury and (1942) Lord Lang of Lambeth

### Letters

- [To Christabel Rose Coleridge, July 23d [1899]](../letters/3412_To_Christabel_Rose_Coleridge.html)

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
